Product Features

  • Spacious Dining Surface: The 75" long rectangular tabletop provides an expansive area for family feasts or friendly gatherings, effortlessly accommodating all your culinary essentials.
  • Comfortable Seating for Two: Equipped with 2 sturdy benches seamlessly integrated into its design, this picnic table ensures a cozy spot for a couple to dine, making it ideal for intimate settings.
  • Durable Fir Wood Craftsmanship: Made entirely of fir wood, this picnic table showcases remarkable strength and resilience against cracking, promising enduring use even in outdoor environments.
  • Sturdy Support Structure: Reinforced with a thickened support frame, this table boasts a substantial weight capacity, capable of handling heavy loads with ease, ensuring stability and safety throughout your meals.
  • Versatile & Secure Design: Featuring a built-in 2" diameter umbrella hole that fits most parasols, you can savor shaded dining experiences. Additionally, the smooth, rectangular edges are thoughtfully designed to prevent accidental knocks, and the option for free painting allows you to personalize your picnic table to match your unique style.
